curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies a single source file: the XHTML wiki printer's cleanAttributes method. The patch adds a removeInvalidDataAttributeCharacters() helper that strips non-XML-compatible characters from attribute names before prefixing them with the data attribute prefix. Three overloaded cleanAttributes methods (Map, String[][], and Attributes variants) all had the same bug — prefixing disallowed attribute names without sanitizing invalid characters. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern; the only other file in the same package is the parent class XMLWikiPrinter which does not perform attribute cleaning. Vulnerability class confirmed as xss — CWE-79, CWE-83, CWE-86 all relate to improper neutralization of characters enabling script injection in web pages.
